main.heroDescription: Ballroom wear without compromise. Every detail crafted for your confidence on the dance floor.
main.orderArchitectureDesc: Two uncompromising paths to creating your ideal look.
main.individualDesc: Premium custom tailoring to your measurements
main.readyDesc: Ready-to-wear from the catalog for quick ordering
main.engineeringTagline: K.I.RICH SEWING STUDIO — the masculine character of your dance
main.philosophyMissionDesc: We create flawless men's ballroom wear that gives confidence in every movement. Our goal is to take the burden of searching, quality concerns, and deadlines off dancers and their parents, allowing them to focus fully on the magic of dance and victory.
main.philosophyVisionDesc: A men's ballroom suit is not just clothing for the floor. It is the architecture of movement, character, and a dancer's second skin. For a long time, men's ballroom wardrobes remained in the shadow of lavish women's gowns. We are changing that balance. K.I.RICH SEWING STUDIO is a space where men's ballroom wear — from basic training pieces to refined competition attire — is the main and only priority.
main.philosophyValue1Desc: We do not spread ourselves thin. We have mastered the anatomy of men's dance, the specifics of construction, and garment modeling for partners of any age — from young beginners to professionals.
main.philosophyValue2Desc: In ballroom sport, there is no such thing as "tomorrow" when the competition is today. We guarantee orders are completed within clearly agreed deadlines without any loss of quality.
main.philosophyValue3Desc: We know how hard it is to find "your" atelier. That is why we offer clients not just tailoring, but premium service: from attention to the smallest fitting details to official bank payment and reliable delivery across Ukraine and worldwide.
main.philosophyManifestoDesc: The dance floor forgives no compromises. When the spotlights come on and the music begins, your suit must work for you. We created K.I.RICH SEWING STUDIO so that every man and boy feels like the king of the floor — impeccably dressed, stylish, and confident in victory.

deliveryAndPayment.title: Delivery & Payment
deliveryAndPayment.condition1: Minimum retail order — 1 item, regardless of your location or delivery country.
deliveryAndPayment.condition2: After placing the order, a manager will contact you to clarify details and send an invoice for payment via your preferred method.
deliveryAndPayment.condition3: Orders are completed within agreed timeframes. In case of production workload or depending on the country's situation, deadlines may increase.
deliveryAndPayment.customPaymentDesc: Payment for custom tailoring orders is made in stages:
deliveryAndPayment.prepaymentNote: of the order amount to begin work
deliveryAndPayment.restPayment: The remaining amount is paid upon order completion.
deliveryAndPayment.deliveryDesc: Within 1-2 business days from the moment the order is ready, your package will be assembled and shipped via a logistics company:
deliveryAndPayment.deliveryNote1: After shipping, our manager will contact you and provide all the necessary information for receiving the package.
deliveryAndPayment.deliveryNote2: All shipping costs are paid by the Buyer.
deliveryAndPayment.deliveryWarning: In case of loss or damage to the package, our studio is not responsible for the services provided by the logistics company.
deliveryAndPayment.paymentDesc: Payment for orders within Ukraine is made in the national currency — Ukrainian hryvnia (₴). If you are abroad, you can pay in dollars ($) or euros (€) at the exchange rate on the day of payment.
deliveryAndPayment.cardTransferDesc: The most modern and popular payment method. The client transfers money to the studio's bank card via terminals or branches, which takes just a few minutes.
deliveryAndPayment.workOrderDesc: After receiving the prepayment, we start working on the order. When it's ready and the remaining amount is paid, we ship the order to the specified address.
deliveryAndPayment.swiftDesc: A convenient payment method for clients abroad. The transfer is made to the studio's details in the agreed currency ($ or €).
deliveryAndPayment.swiftNote: Please note: such transfers are credited to the studio's account within 1-5 business days. The fixed bank commission for currency crediting, as well as the customs commission, is paid by the Buyer.
deliveryAndPayment.swiftWarning: When making a SWIFT transfer, be sure to specify the commission type "FULL" or "OUR".

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: "K.I.RICH SEWING STUDIO" not only strives to satisfy clients' wishes but also cares about protecting the personal data of every buyer. We respect your choice, so we make every effort to protect confidential client information from third parties.
privacyPolicy.personalInfoDesc1: When visiting our website, our clients can rest assured that their actions are not being tracked, as we do not do this. When browsing sections, subsections, and pages of the service, you can remain anonymous or receive special anonymous guest access to the resource. However, it's worth noting that the browser automatically informs our company about the type of electronic device you use to access the Internet, as well as the type of operating system installed on it.
privacyPolicy.personalInfoDesc2: The data you provide when filling out the registration form and order fields is the only personal information about you that we possess. You may need to enter personal data of the following nature:
privacyPolicy.voluntaryNote: Providing data is completely voluntary and is only necessary to speed up the processing of orders placed in our studio.
privacyPolicy.howProcessed: How is personal client information processed?
privacyPolicy.howProcessedDesc: Personal information is used within narrow tasks: in marketing analysis of the target audience's needs, wishes, and recommendations. In particular, it becomes an effective tool for:
privacyPolicy.process1: Professional assistance provided by our consultants to clients during orders.
privacyPolicy.process3: Notifying about studio news, new arrivals, current promotions and discounts.
privacyPolicy.staticInfoDesc: To ensure the smooth functioning of the website and for personal analysis of traffic statistics, we study IP addresses of site visits. The collected data does not affect the personal space of clients, does not concern deeply personal information, and is processed exclusively as generalized user statistics.
privacyPolicy.analyticsDesc: We use Vercel Web Analytics, a built-in analytics service provided by our hosting platform Vercel, to collect anonymous visit statistics (pages viewed, referral source, device type, and browser). The service does not use cookies, does not collect personal data, and does not identify individual users across different days or websites.
privacyPolicy.howProtectedDesc: All data provided by you is stored by the studio in a secure database and is not shared with third parties. Exceptions are cases where the user has agreed to their transfer, or in cases provided by law. In other situations, the studio undertakes to maintain the confidentiality of information, guided by the principles of decency and respect for the Buyer.
privacyPolicy.cookiesDesc1: In fact, the protection of personal user data is not related to the concept of cookies. Cookies only simplify the use of various websites by automatically collecting certain types of information. They are text documents stored by the web page server on the hard drive of the electronic device.
privacyPolicy.cookiesDesc2: Cookies do not affect the operating system settings or files on the computer, but they significantly save the user's time. With their help, it is possible to:
privacyPolicy.cookiesFormsDesc: Quickly fill in fields (name, surname, address, email, phone numbers, etc.).
privacyPolicy.cookiesSettingsDesc: Save your own settings on the website for subsequent visits.
privacyPolicy.cookiesCartDesc: Keep saved items in the Cart for further order processing.

tailoringLayout.disclaimer: * The accuracy and correctness of the provided measurements are the client's responsibility. Please verify the data before confirming the order.

measurementDescriptions.waist_definition: Tie an elastic band to determine the location of the thinnest part of the torso — the waist. Most measurements are taken to/from this line
measurementDescriptions.chest: Measured at the most prominent points of the chest, passing through the shoulder blades on the back
measurementDescriptions.waist: Measured at the narrowest part of the torso, wrapping the measuring tape around the waist
measurementDescriptions.hips: Measured around the most prominent areas of the buttocks
measurementDescriptions.shoulders: Measured from the base of the neck through the center of the chest to the waistline vertically downward
measurementDescriptions.shoulders_back: Measured along the back from the base of the neck to the waistline vertically downward
measurementDescriptions.side_height: Measured along the side seam from the armpit to the waistline
measurementDescriptions.seat_height: Measured from the waist to the seat of the chair
measurementDescriptions.arm_length: Measured from the edge of the shoulder to the wrist along the outer side of the arm
measurementDescriptions.wrist: Measured with a horizontal wrap along the wrist line
measurementDescriptions.arm_girth: Measured with a horizontal wrap around the widest upper part of the arm
measurementDescriptions.seat_length: Measured in a half-arc from waist to waist through the crotch
measurementDescriptions.arch: Measured by wrapping the torso through the crotch to the base of the neck
measurementDescriptions.neck: Measured around the neck at the location of the intended collar
measurementDescriptions.product_length: Measured from the waistline to the desired bottom of the product
measurementDescriptions.pants_length: Measured from the waistline to the bottom of the pants along the outer side of the leg
measurementDescriptions.pants_bottom_width: Measured by selecting the desired width of the pants at the bottom
measurementDescriptions.height: Enter your height in the selected units without shoes
